title: Ametrin API
body:

![Ametrin API Banner](https://i.imgur.com/fYzEsIq.png)
    
  [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/block%20variants-d7742f?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/block-variants)
  [![Build with NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-neoforge-d7742f?style=for-the-badge)](https://neoforged.net/)
  
</center>


# QoL API by Ametrin Studios

#### Current Features

*   lots of data gen helpers
*   block classes (DoublePlant, AgeableBush, AgableDoublePlant, Head, Torch, etc)
*   creating netherlike portals
*   creating Trees and Saplings
*   StructurePieces
*   TerrainAnalyzer (used by [Dungeons Enhanced](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeonsenhanced))
*   time conversion
*   color conversion
*   adding strippable logs
*   lots more

If you want to use Ametrin API for your own projects check the GitHub repo.  
You can ask questions on our Discord server.
